notes: Each eval prompts for a SINGLE-slide HyperFrames HTML composition (not a full 8-slide carousel) so iterations stay fast. Assertions target v2 mandatory rules: Decorative safe-zone, VISUAL PROOF GATE, POST-RENDER AUTOHEAL CHECK, glyph escaping, counter timing, brand fidelity.

evals.name: hook_slide_no_decoration
evals.prompt: Write a single-slide HTML/CSS composition for the HOOK slide (slide 1) of an Instagram carousel using HyperFrames. 720x900 px. Brand: Lead Gen Jay. Topic: 'AI that writes your cold emails for you.' Include: section label 'THE PROBLEM', headline (4-5 words, ALL CAPS, Big Shoulders Display 100px), swap pill with 3 cycling words (use #ED0D51 fill), italic body copy, CTA pill 'SWIPE TO LEARN HOW', footer with @leadgenjay handle + progress bar at 1/8. Animate entrances with GSAP. Register the timeline on window.__timelines['main']. Output the complete index.html file.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file with viewport meta, html/body 720x900, dark #0D0D0D background, #ED0D51 accent pill, Big Shoulders Display headline at >=80px, Manrope italic body, footer with progress bar, GSAP timeline. NO decorative stars/asterisks/rotating shapes in headline or body zones. NO banned AI words. Glyph characters HTML-escaped where present.

assertions.text: Output contains dimension declarations matching 720 (width) and 900 (height) in viewport meta or html/body CSS
Brand accent hex #ED0D51 appears in code (case-insensitive)
Background hex #0D0D0D appears in code (case-insensitive)
Headline font-family declaration includes 'Big Shoulders' (Big Shoulders Display)
Body font-family declaration includes 'Manrope'
At least one font-size value of 80px or greater is present (headline)

No banned AI words: delve, tapestry, realm, landscape, ever-evolving, cutting-edge, robust, transformative, pivotal, vibrant, crucial, compelling, seamless, groundbreaking, leverage, harness, embark, navigate, unveil, facilitate, synergy, game-changer, unlock, unleash, elevate, utilize, endeavour, multifaceted
assertions.check: no banned word found in output (case-insensitive)

assertions.text: NO decorative stars/asterisks present in body zone (i.e. no ★ ✦ ✶ ✨ \u2605 \u2728 unicode chars AND no CSS class names like 'star', 'asterisk', 'decoration', 'sparkle' that would render at body y-coordinates)
Footer block with progress bar is present (class containing 'footer' AND 'progress' related markup)
GSAP timeline registered on window.__timelines (e.g. window.__timelines["main"] = tl)

evals.name: feature_slide_visual_proof_gate
evals.prompt: Write a single-slide HTML/CSS composition for the SOLUTION slide (slide 3) of an Instagram carousel using HyperFrames. 720x900 px. Brand: Lead Gen Jay. Central claim: 'Instantly drops your cold-email bounce rate below 2%.' Use the brand design system. Output the complete index.html file. Decide what proof visual to embed before writing the HTML.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file referencing a real Instantly asset (logo or dashboard screenshot path from the project asset libraries). Should NOT fabricate a fake terminal/dashboard UI when a real Instantly screenshot/logo exists. Brand fidelity intact.

assertions.text: Brand accent hex #ED0D51 appears in code
Background hex #0D0D0D appears in code
Headline font-family includes 'Big Shoulders'
Body font-family includes 'Manrope'

VISUAL PROOF GATE: HTML references a real Instantly asset (image src or background-image pointing to 'instantly' in filename, .png/.webp/.jpg/.svg, OR a path containing 'Tool Logos' / 'public/ads/assets/lead gen' / 'instantly_logo' / 'instantly_2024')

VISUAL PROOF GATE: Does NOT fabricate a fake terminal/code-mockup UI when a real screenshot is available (i.e. when an instantly asset IS referenced, there should NOT also be a hand-drawn '.terminal' or '.code-mockup' class with fake bash/shell content)
Footer block with progress bar is present
No banned AI words
assertions.check: no banned word found in output (case-insensitive)

evals.name: hero_panel_glyph_escaping
evals.prompt: Write a single-slide HTML/CSS composition for the WHY slide (slide 5) of an Instagram carousel using HyperFrames. 720x900 px. Brand: Lead Gen Jay. The slide is built around a prominent pink hero panel containing the paradigm-shift statement: PROCESS > PERSUASION. (literal text, including the greater-than glyph). Use #ED0D51 fill for the hero panel with #0D0D0D text on the panel. Output the complete index.html file. Make sure all characters render literally in the browser.
evals.expected_output: A complete HTML file where the literal characters 'PROCESS > PERSUASION' appear visually rendered (so the source HTML must contain 'PROCESS > PERSUASION' with the > escaped, NOT a raw '>' which the browser would silently swallow inside an attribute or near a tag).

assertions.text: Hero panel uses #ED0D51 as a background fill (background:#ED0D51 or background-color:#ED0D51)
Slide background uses #0D0D0D
Hero panel text color is #0D0D0D (black-on-pink, not white-on-pink — readability rule)
Greater-than glyph is HTML-escaped as > in source (the literal > entity must appear) — per [[feedback-special-glyphs-in-html-text]]
The literal text 'PROCESS' appears in source (the brief content was honored)
The literal text 'PERSUASION' appears in source
Headline font-family includes 'Big Shoulders'
Footer block with progress bar is present
No banned AI words
assertions.check: no banned word found in output (case-insensitive)
